description.en: Create a new email campaign in Mailcoach. Campaigns start in draft status.
description.de: Erstelle eine neue E-Mail-Kampagne in Mailcoach. Kampagnen starten im Entwurfsstatus.
description.es: Create a new email campaign in Mailcoach. Campaigns start in draft status.
description.fr: Create a new email campaign in Mailcoach. Campaigns start in draft status.
description.ro: Create a new email campaign in Mailcoach. Campaigns start in draft status.
description.it: Create a new email campaign in Mailcoach. Campaigns start in draft status.

description.en: The internal name of the campaign.
description.es: The internal name of the campaign.
description.fr: The internal name of the campaign.
description.ro: The internal name of the campaign.
description.it: The internal name of the campaign.

description.en: The UUID of the email list to send this campaign to.
description.es: The UUID of the email list to send this campaign to.
description.fr: The UUID of the email list to send this campaign to.
description.ro: The UUID of the email list to send this campaign to.
description.it: The UUID of the email list to send this campaign to.

description.en: The subject line of the campaign email.
description.es: The subject line of the campaign email.
description.fr: The subject line of the campaign email.
description.ro: The subject line of the campaign email.
description.it: The subject line of the campaign email.

description.en: The HTML content of the campaign email.
description.es: The HTML content of the campaign email.
description.fr: The HTML content of the campaign email.
description.ro: The HTML content of the campaign email.
description.it: The HTML content of the campaign email.

description.en: UUID of a Mailcoach template to use for this campaign.
description.es: UUID of a Mailcoach template to use for this campaign.
description.fr: UUID of a Mailcoach template to use for this campaign.
description.ro: UUID of a Mailcoach template to use for this campaign.
description.it: UUID of a Mailcoach template to use for this campaign.

description.en: JSON object of template field values, e.g. {"content": "Hello world"}.

description.it: JSON object of template field values, e.g. {"content": "Hello world"}.
